board_csa_architect.notes: No schema impact. Clean Docker isolation pattern. Aligns with REQ-INF-1 containerization strategy. Phase K promotion justified — pilot needs reliable extraction.

board_ciso_cybersecurity.notes: Zero network attack surface — offline container. No PII processing. Model weights mounted read-only. Registry push uses standard auth. No RLS impact.

board_caio_fullstack.notes: No VRAM budget impact on main vLLM container. Extraction runs in separate container with own GPU allocation. transformers==4.45.0 pin is stable. Multi-stage build is clean.

board_vp_ops_devops.notes: Deterministic build, reproducible across environments. Standalone docker run — no service mesh dependency. Registry push ensures consistent deployment. 3AM test: image is pre-built, no build-time failure at runtime.

board_red_team.notes: 3 failure scenarios: (1) supply chain pip poisoning — mitigate with hash pinning, (2) GPU resource exhaustion if extraction runs concurrent with vLLM — add scheduling guidance, (3) registry credential leak in CI logs. STRIDE: Tampering=Medium (use content digests), DoS=Medium (GPU contention). Condition: document that extraction should run during maintenance windows or when vLLM is idle.
